financials.role: financial statement cross-check candidate; not valuation SSOT

overview.description: Lam Research Corporation designs, manufactures, markets, refurbishes, and services semiconductor processing equipment used in the fabrication of integrated circuits in the United States, China, Korea, Taiwan, Japan, Southeast Asia, and Europe. The company offers ALTUS systems to deposit conformal or selective films for tungsten or molybdenum metallization applications; SABRE electrochemical deposition products for copper interconnect transition that offers copper damascene manufacturing; SPEED gapfill high-density plasma chemical vapor depositi...
overview.financialIntro: In fiscal year 2025, Lam Research's revenue was $18.44 billion, an increase of 23.68% compared to the previous year's $14.91 billion. Earnings were $5.36 billion, an increase of 39.98%.
overview.analystIntro: According to 35 analysts, the average rating for LRCX stock is "Buy." The 12-month stock price target is $353.9, which is an increase of 6.06% from the latest price.
